name: Actor
summary: +1 CHA and performance/deception mimicry benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Advantage and impersonation benefits are not modeled.

name: Alert
summary: +5 initiative and heightened awareness.

name: Athlete
summary: +1 STR or DEX and improved movement stunts.
manualResolutionReason: Standing and climbing movement clauses are not modeled.

name: Charger
summary: Dash attack/shove bonus action option.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional combat action is not modeled.

name: Crossbow Expert
summary: Crossbow loading and close-range benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Weapon property overrides and attack action interactions are not modeled.

name: Defensive Duelist
summary: Reaction AC bonus while wielding finesse weapon.
manualResolutionReason: Reaction-time conditional AC bonus is not modeled.

name: Dual Wielder
summary: Dual wield flexibility and AC bonus while dual wielding.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional AC and weapon handling rules are not modeled.

name: Dungeon Delver
summary: Trap detection and resistance utility benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Exploration and trap-specific effects are not modeled.

name: Durable
summary: +1 CON and stronger Hit Die healing floor.
manualResolutionReason: Hit Die healing floor behavior is not modeled.

name: Elemental Adept
summary: Element-specific spell damage tuning.
manualResolutionReason: Elemental damage roll and resistance interactions are not modeled.

name: Grappler
summary: Grapple-focused combat options.
manualResolutionReason: Grapple conditions and combat options are not modeled.

name: Great Weapon Master
summary: Heavy weapon power attack and bonus attack triggers.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional combat tradeoffs are not modeled.

name: Healer
summary: Expanded healer's kit recovery actions.
manualResolutionReason: Item use healing actions are not modeled.

name: Heavily Armored
summary: +1 STR and heavy armor proficiency.

name: Heavy Armor Master
summary: +1 STR and nonmagical physical damage reduction in heavy armor.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional damage reduction is not modeled.

name: Inspiring Leader
summary: Grant temporary hit points after speech.
manualResolutionReason: Temporary HP support and group targeting are not modeled.

name: Keen Mind
summary: +1 INT and memory/navigation benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Memory and navigation benefits are not modeled.

name: Lightly Armored
summary: +1 STR or DEX and light armor proficiency.

name: Linguist
summary: +1 INT and three languages.

name: Lucky
summary: Luck points to reroll d20 checks.
manualResolutionReason: Per-rest luck point spend tracking is not modeled.

name: Mage Slayer
summary: Anti-caster reaction and concentration pressure.
manualResolutionReason: Reaction timing and concentration disadvantage are not modeled.

name: Magic Initiate
summary: Learn cantrips and one 1st-level spell from a class list.
manualResolutionReason: Cross-list spell learning and usage cadence are not modeled.

name: Martial Adept
summary: Gain maneuvers and superiority die.
manualResolutionReason: Maneuver and superiority die subsystem is not modeled.

name: Medium Armor Master
summary: Medium armor stealth and dex cap adjustments.
manualResolutionReason: Armor property override logic is not modeled.

name: Mobile
summary: +10 speed and movement/attack mobility benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional movement interaction rules are not modeled.

name: Moderately Armored
summary: +1 STR or DEX and medium armor + shield proficiency.

name: Mounted Combatant
summary: Mounted combat offense/defense advantages.
manualResolutionReason: Mount combat subsystem is not modeled.

name: Observant
summary: +1 INT or WIS and passive perception/investigation bonuses.
manualResolutionReason: Passive skill score tracking is not modeled.

name: Polearm Master
summary: Bonus attacks and opportunity trigger with polearms.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional attack generation is not modeled.

name: Resilient
summary: +1 ability and proficiency in matching saving throw.

name: Ritual Caster
summary: Ritual book and access to ritual spells.
manualResolutionReason: Ritual spellbook subsystem is not modeled.

name: Savage Attacker
summary: Reroll melee damage once per turn.
manualResolutionReason: Per-turn damage reroll is not modeled.

name: Sentinel
summary: Opportunity and movement control combat benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Reaction combat constraints are not modeled.

name: Sharpshooter
summary: Ranged combat tradeoff and cover benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Conditional attack tradeoffs and cover rules are not modeled.

name: Shield Master
summary: Shield bash and dexterity save shield benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Bonus action shove and save interaction logic are not modeled.

name: Skilled
summary: Gain three skill/tool proficiencies.

name: Skulker
summary: Stealth and obscured vision benefits.
manualResolutionReason: Visibility and stealth interaction rules are not modeled.

name: Spell Sniper
summary: Spell range and cover benefits with extra cantrip.

name: Tavern Brawler

name: Tough
summary: +2 hit points per level.

name: War Caster

manualResolutionReason: Concentration advantage and reaction casting are not modeled.

name: Weapon Master
